description: Fix and complete a broken legacy PsychoPy experiment by creating '~/PsychoPyExperiments/shape_task.psyexp'. The experiment must correctly load stimuli from '~/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli/' despite the '~/PsychoPyExperiments/legacy_conditions.csv' file containing Windows-style absolute paths. Implement a trial loop that displays the shape and corresponding 'match_text', collects 'y'/'n' keyboard responses, and provides color-coded feedback ('Correct!' in green or 'Wrong!' in red) based on response accuracy.
